release_notes: v0.4.3 (BP083): BP081 distribution canon restored — binary self-hosted at mnemosynec.ai/download/ (primary), GitHub Release is mirror only. Homepage hero restored to Amnesia/Cure verbatim. Hardware-tier thresholds tuned — Premium gemma4:12b is default at 16+ GB, Heavy llama3.3:70b is opt-in only. Just Add Salt moved to Does It Actually Work section.
